segments.text: Lord, how they have increased who trouble me! Many are they who rise up against me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Many are they who say of me, 'There is no help for him in God.'
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But You, O Lord, are a shield for me, My glory and the One who lifts up my head.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I cried to the Lord with my voice, And He heard me from His holy hill.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I lay down and slept; I awoke, for the Lord sustained me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will not be afraid of ten thousands of people Who have set themselves against me all around.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Arise, O Lord; Save me, O my God! For You have struck all my enemies on the cheekbone; You have broken the teeth of the ungodly.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Salvation belongs to the Lord. Your blessing is upon Your people.
segments.speaker: David
